env HOME=${WORK}

[linux] env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${HOME}/.config
[linux] env XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${HOME}/runtime
[linux] mkdir ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME}/dex
[linux] mkdir ${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR}
[linux] mv config.toml ${HOME}/.config/dex/config.toml

[darwin] mkdir ${HOME}'/Library/Application Support/dex'
[darwin] mv config.toml ${HOME}'/Library/Application Support/dex/config.toml'

env GOBIN=${WORK}/bin
env PATH=${GOBIN}:${PATH}
cd ${PKG_ROOT}
go install ./cmd/rest
cd ${WORK}

dex -log debug -lines &dex&
sleep 1s

# Write a value to the state store as rest (no "from" override).
GET http://localhost:10070/
stdout '^ok$'

# Read by other_rest with no "from": no match due to item
# addressing. The data was written under rest's UID, not other_rest's.
GET http://localhost:10071/
stdout '^null$'

# Read by other_rest with "from" override to "rest": permitted by
# allow_forward rule. The get succeeds because we are proxying to
# rest.
GET http://localhost:10072/
cmp stdout want_read.txt

# Read by denied_rest with "from" to rest: no matching allow_forward
# rule. The kernel rejects the call before it reaches the store.
GET http://localhost:10073/
stdout '^null$'

kill -INT dex
wait dex

-- config.toml --
[kernel]
device = []
network = "tcp"

[[kernel.allow_forward]]
origin = "other_rest"
identity = "rest"
target = "kernel"
method = "get"

[module.rest]
path = "rest"
log_mode = "log"
log_level = "debug"
log_add_source = true

[module.rest.options.server.writer]
addr = "localhost:10070"
request = """
{
	"method": "set",
	"params": {"item": "test_key", "value": b"test_value"}
}
"""
response = """
"ok"
"""

[module.other_rest]
path = "rest"
log_mode = "log"
log_level = "debug"
log_add_source = true

[module.other_rest.options.server.reader]
addr = "localhost:10071"
request = """
{
	"method": "get",
	"params": {"item": "test_key"}
}
"""
response = """
response.body
"""

[module.other_rest.options.server.allowed_reader]
addr = "localhost:10072"
request = """
{
	"method": "get",
	"params": {"item": "test_key"},
	"from": {"module": "rest"}
}
"""
response = """
response.body
"""

[module.denied_rest]
path = "rest"
log_mode = "log"
log_level = "debug"
log_add_source = true

[module.denied_rest.options.server.reader]
addr = "localhost:10073"
request = """
{
	"method": "get",
	"params": {"item": "test_key"},
	"from": {"module": "rest"}
}
"""
response = """
response.body
"""

-- want_read.txt --
{"value":"dGVzdF92YWx1ZQ=="}
